raw.title: Hungry for Democracy
raw.excerpt: Donald Trump has made history – the federal government shutdown has now lasted over 40 days. Through this perverse achievement, his administration has jeopardized food access for 42 million people

llm_processed.summary: Examines how democratic processes can address food insecurity and empower local communities through participatory decision-making.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Links to designing inclusive, food-secure systems through cooperative governance models.
